title: Ned Leeds
content:
{{CharHub|Ned Leeds|Ned Leeds}} {{Character |image = Ned Leeds Infobox.jpg |real name = Edward Leeds{{Ref|TTT}}[https://twitter.com/SpiderManMovie/status/1154860725707259904 Ned Leeds' United States Passport] |alias = {{Alias |primary = Ned Leeds{{Ref|SMH}} |nicknames = The Guy in the Chair{{Ref|SMH}} |media = Spider-Minion{{Ref|SMH}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |DOB = [[2001|November 10, 2001]] |DOD = [[2018|May 2018]]{{Ref|AIW}}{{Ref|SnapAMatW}}{{Ref|MSTMCUAOT}} ([[Blip|resurrected]] in [[2023|October 2023]]) |snapped = Yes{{Ref|AE}} |affiliation = {{Affiliation|MSST}} (formerly)
{{Affiliation|MIT}} |movie = ''[[Spider-Man: Homecoming]]''
''[[Avengers: Infinity War]]''
''[[Avengers: Endgame]]''
''[[Spider-Man: Far From Home]]''
''[[Spider-Man: No Way Home]]''
''[[Spider-Man: Brand New Day]]'' (unreleased)[https://www.tiktok.com/@siriusxm/video/7598192890170313997 Jacob Batalon via SiriusXM on TikTok - January 22, 2026] |oneshot = ''[[Peter's To-Do List]]'' |web series = ''[[The Daily Bugle/Promotional Campaign|The Daily Bugle]]'' |comic = ''[[Spider-Man: Far From Home Prelude]]'' |actor = [[Jacob Batalon]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|You can take the guy out of the chair, but you can't take the chair out of the guy.|Ned Leeds to [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} '''Edward "Ned" Leeds''' is a former student at [[Midtown School of Science and Technology]]. Upon discovering his best friend, [[Peter Parker]], was Spider-Man, Leeds then focused on assisting Parker in his heroics as they attempted to find and defeat [[Vulture]] before he could sell high-tech hybrid weapons to the criminal underworld, while also hoping to use the Spider-Man identity to improve their own social standing at school. Leeds was a victim of the [[Snap]], but, along with all the other victims, was brought back to life by the [[Hulk]] in [[2023]]. The [[2024|following year]], Leeds would go on a school field trip to [[Europe]] with his classmates, including Parker. When their trip was interrupted due to the [[Elementals]] [[Mysterio's Masquerade|crisis]], Leeds would do his best to cover for Parker as he investigated and fought the perpetrator, [[Mysterio]], so that his secret identity as Spider-Man would not be revealed. During this time, Leeds also had a brief romance with [[Betty Brant]]. Leeds worked once more with Parker as his "guy in the chair" when, due to [[Doctor Strange]]'s botched [[Runes of Kof-Kol|spell]] to make the world forget that Parker was Spider-Man, villains from alternate universes [[Spider-Man Multiversal Crisis|crossed]] over into theirs; Leeds and Parker's girlfriend, [[Michelle Jones]], aided Parker in capturing the visitors, but then helped free them from Strange after discovering his plan involved sending these visitors to their deaths. Using Strange's [[Sling Ring]], Leeds accidentally summoned [[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|alternate]] [[Amazing Spider-Man|versions]] of Parker, who helped him, Parker, and Jones in taking down the visitors, who had betrayed them. Tragically, though, instabilities in Strange's spell could only be solved by having the entire world, including Leeds, forget Parker's existence. Leeds exchanged a tearful goodbye with Parker before his memories of him were erased. In his new life, Leeds was accepted into [[Massachusetts Institute of Technology|MIT]] and maintained a friendship with Jones. ==Biography== {{MD|Edward Leeds (Earth-199999)}} ===Midtown Student=== ====Friendship with Peter Parker==== {{Quote|Join me and together, we'll build my new {{WPS|LEGO}} {{WPS|Death Star}}."
"What!?|Ned Leeds and [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} [[File:Ned Leeds & Peter Parker (Midtown High).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds invites [[Peter Parker]] to play with {{WPS|LEGO}}]] Edward "Ned" Leeds was born [[2001|November 10, 2001]]. By [[2016|September 2016]], he was a student at [[Midtown School of Science and Technology]] and was [[Peter Parker]]'s best friend. He was also a member of the Academic Decathlon Team. At the beginning of the [[2016]]-[[2017]] school year, Leeds revealed to Parker that he had just gotten the {{WPS|LEGO}} {{WPS|Death Star}}, and asked if he wanted to help build it tonight. Parker ended up distracted by [[Liz Allan]] passing by, however, and unwittingly accepted.{{Ref|SMH}} ===Guy in the Chair=== ====Spider-Man Discovery==== [[File:SMH Trailer 65.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds learns [[Peter Parker]] is the [[Spider-Man]]]] {{Quote|You're the Spider-Man. From {{WPS|YouTube}}."
"I'm not, I'm not!"
"You were on the ceiling!|Ned Leeds and [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} Shortly after, Leeds went to [[Parker Residence|Parker's apartment]]. While Parker was not in due to the "Stark Internship," his Aunt [[May Parker|May]] allowed Leeds to wait in his room. Leeds was playing with the LEGO Death Star when he saw [[Peter Parker]] enter through the window, crawling on the ceiling while wearing his [[Spider-Man Suit]]. Leeds dropped the Death Star in disbelief and surprised Parker, who had to admit that he was Spider-Man but got Leeds to agree to keep it a secret. [[File:Peter & Ned - Walk to Midtown.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds and [[Peter Parker]] walk to [[Midtown School of Science and Technology|school]]]] While Parker tried to resume his daily life, Leeds asked him questions of when he was aware of his superpowers. On the way to [[Midtown School of Science and Technology|school]], Leeds listened to Parker recount how he gained his powers from being bitten by the spider and that it was now dead. On route, they came across the aftermath of the [[Robbery of the Queens Community Bank]], as Parker noted the arrival of the [[United States Department of Damage Control]] and [[Anne Marie Hoag]] before they continued towards school. [[File:SMH Trailer2 11.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds bombards [[Peter Parker]] with questions]] While they sat in their classes, including science and one lecture on the origins of the [[Sokovia Accords]], Leeds bombarded Parker with questions regarding his abilities as Spider-Man, such as how he gained his powers as well as other trivial matters which soon began to annoy Parker. As he continued, Leeds further questioned Parker, who ignored most of the questions as Leeds asked if he laid eggs, how far he could fire his [[Web-Shooters]], and if he could summon an army of spiders. [[File:SMH Trailer2 14.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds listens to [[Peter Parker]]'s knowledge]] As they prepared for Coach [[Andre Wilson]]'s gym class, they were shown a video of [[Captain America's Fitness Challenge]]. Leeds continued to question Parker whether he had met other heroes like [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]]. Unexpectedly anticipating his question's answer, Leeds listened to Parker that he had once managed to successfully steal [[Captain America's Shield]] during the [[Battle at Leipzig-Halle Airport]], much to his complete amazement. [[File:SMH Fan's Guide 48.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds helps [[Peter Parker]] with his [[Captain America's Fitness Challenge|fitness]]]] When they were continuing their training in the school's gym, Leeds continued to question about the [[Avengers]] until Parker told him to shut up. Leeds would then asked Parker if he could be the guy in the chair, much to Parker's confusion. Leeds noted to Parker that he could be giving him assistance during missions, exemplifying that if Parker was in at a burning building, he could tell Parker where to go due to the number of screens around him, but Parker still refused his offer. [[File:Peter's Realization (Midtown Gym).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds convinces [[Peter Parker]] for the party]] Leeds and Parker then overheard [[Liz Allan]] talking with her friends, including [[Betty Brant]] and [[Seymour O'Reilly]] about the Avengers, even confessing to harboring a crush on Spider-Man. Knowing this information, Leeds blurted out in front of the entire class that Parker knew Spider-Man. When they both got invited to Toomes' party, Leeds convinced Parker to make an appearance as Spider-Man to increase their social standing.{{Ref|SMH}} ====Liz Allan's Party==== [[File:SMH Lame Party 1.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds arrives to the party with [[Peter Parker]]]] {{Quote|Peter, where are you? The hat's not working, this not cool.|Ned Leeds|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} Later that same evening, [[May Parker|May]] drove the pair onto the [[Toomes Residence]], noting her own love for house parties. While outside the house, May complimented Leeds on his hat while [[Peter Parker]] became nervous and suggested going home, only for May to tease him by his own body's changes until Leeds told Parker to finally enter the party, much to his great delight. Leeds asked Parker if he was wearing the [[Spider-Man Suit]] beneath his clothing, to which Parker confirmed. [[File:SMH Lame Party 4.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds tells [[Peter Parker]] to be Spider-Man]] Entering the house, they saw that [[Flash Thompson]] was acting as the DJ for the party while [[Michelle Jones]] teased them for coming to the party while denying that she was also attending the party. They were soon greeted by [[Liz Allan]], who told them to hang around the party. Setting up his plan, Leeds insisted that Parker needed to dress up as Spider-Man to impress everybody there, but Parker refused and was adamant to be himself, despite Leeds insisting that nobody wants that. [[File:NLeeds-ThisNotCool-Phonecall.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds calls [[Peter Parker]] for his arrival]] After another taunt from Thompson, who mocked Parker for failing to arrive with Spider-Man, Leeds was left waiting at the party so that Parker can excuse himself and donned his costume outside on the Toomes Residence's roof in private, however when Parker noticed an explosion and had to bail to investigate what turned out to be an arms deal. Leeds then called Parker multiple times, realizing that he ditched. Once Parker answered, Leeds, advised him not to return to the party since Thompson had continued to make a mockery out of him.{{Ref|SMH}} ====Assisting Spider-Man==== [[File:SMH Class BtS.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds talks to [[Peter Parker]] about the [[Chitauri Energy Core|item]]]] {{Quote|Evil lair?"
"Dude, a [[Adrian Toomes' Crew|gang]] with [[Anti-Gravity Gun|alien]] [[Ultron Blaster Gun|guns]] run by a [[Vulture|guy]] with [[Vulture's Exo-Suit|wings]]? Yeah, they have a lair."
"Badass.|Ned Leeds and [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} Having broken up the arms deal, [[Peter Parker]] had also discovered the [[Chitauri Energy Core]]. After telling him that he ditched, Leeds noticed that Parker was investigating the energy core and asked him where he found it. He was told by Parker that he encountered it by seeing it left behind in the wake of the recent chase all across the streets with [[Jackson Brice]]. While Leeds expressed his delight at merely being a part of this situation, Parker used a hammer to break the core, as [[Barry Hapgood]] advised his students to keep their fingers clear of the blades, while Leeds and Parker agreed on what to do next before doing their own tradition handshake. [[File:Spider-Man Homecoming still 3.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds noticing [[Peter Parker]] sneaking out]] Once they had spent some time examining the [[Chitauri]] power core, Leeds and Parker had encountered [[Herman Schultz]] and [[Randy Vale]] who had both arrived and searched for the core through [[Midtown School of Science and Technology]]. While Parker hid, Leeds slowly moved towards him and was told that Schultz had attempted to kill him the night before alongside Jackson Brice. Although he insisted that they run and hide, Leeds was ignored by Parker who decided to get a lead on [[Vulture]], As Parker followed Schultz and Vale, as they searched through the school, Leeds was noticed by [[Tiny McKeever]] on what he was doing, to which he told that it was nothing. [[File:SMH Trailer2 16.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds and [[Peter Parker]] locate [[Vulture]]]] Returning to the [[Parker Residence]] together, Leeds helped Parker on tracking Schultz and his gang's current movements as they made their way outside of [[New York City]]. Eventually, while Leeds was trying on the [[Spider-Man Suit|Spider-Man Mask]], they learned that Schultz and Vale had finally stopped in [[Maryland]]. While they discussed with Schultz and his gang had an [[Adrian Toomes' Headquarters|evil lair]], they discussed how to get to Maryland, realizing that the Decathlon was taking place in [[Washington, D.C.]].{{Ref|SMH}} ====Washington D.C. Trip==== [[File:SMH Fan's Guide 46.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds seeing [[Flash Thompson]] demoted]] {{Quote|I gotta follow [[Adrian Toomes' Crew|these guys]] to their [[Vulture|boss]] before they move again... and I don’t really want Mr. Stark to know about it."
"So you’re lying to [[Iron Man]] now?|[[Peter Parker]] and Ned Leeds|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} Seeking to get a lift to [[Maryland]], Leeds joined the Academic Decathlon team in [[Washington, D.C.]] for Nationals. [[Peter Parker]] later ran up to the group as they were all heading onto the bus, asking to rejoin them. Although [[Flash Thompson]] rejected the idea as he had taken Parker's spot, [[Roger Harrington]] was delighted to have Parker back and immediately agreed, causing [[Abe Brown]] to tease Thompson for being demoted, much to Leeds and everyone else's amusement. [[File:PParkerBusRide-CalledByHHogun.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds looks over the tracker on [[Vulture]]'s [[Adrian Toomes' Crew|gang]]]] During the journey to Washington, D.C., [[Liz Allan]] quizzed their team to get them ready for the finals. Leeds, meanwhile, observed the [[Spider-Tracer]] that Parker implanted to track the [[Shocker|two]] [[Randy Vale|members]] of [[Vulture]]'s [[Adrian Toomes' Crew|gang]]. When Parker got a call from [[Happy Hogan]], Leeds listened as Parker protested Hogan tracking him through his [[Spider-Man Suit]] without his consent. Although Leeds indicated they were also invading Vulture's privacy, Parker insisted that was different.{{Ref|SMH}} [[File: Ned, Michelle & Peter (Deleted Scene).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds overlooking the [[Triskelion]] cleanup]] After Parker ended the call, Leeds excitedly asked if it was [[Tony Stark]] or [[Thor]], though Parker pointed out that Thor might not use a phone. As they neared their destination, Leeds and Parker then caught sight of the wreckage of the [[Triskelion]]. [[Michelle Jones]] came over to them and explained that the [[United States Department of Damage Control|Department of Damage Control]] was still clearing up the destruction left behind by [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]] during the [[Battle at the Triskelion]]. While Jones expressed her own conspiracy theories about the incident, Leeds told her that it was probably Captain America helping the people.{{Ref|SMHDS}} [[File:SMH Trailer3 12.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds and [[Peter Parker]] hack the [[Spider-Man Suit|suit]]]] Later, Leeds accessed the Spider-Man Suit's subsystems with his laptop to help Parker locate its tracker. Leeds was wary of his friend's's actions, being told that Parker did not want Stark to know where he was while he tracked Vulture's Crew. Leeds questioned Parker on why he was now lying to Iron Man, to which Parker justified that he was not lying, but just wanted Stark to fully understand everything he could do as a hero, but Leeds remained unsure. Parker then successfully removed the tracker which he placed on a lamp. [[File:SMH Trailer 61.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds disables the [[Spider-Man Suit|suit]]'s [[Training Wheels Protocol|training protocol]]]] Leeds found out that the suit had more many subsystems programmed into it, but they had all been disabled by the [[Training Wheels Protocol]], much to his amusement and Parker's frustration. Parker encouraged Leeds to hack into the suit and disable that protocol. Leeds was concerned that Parker was being reckless, as well as the potential consequences of him tampering with the suit, but ultimately relented when Parker told him to be his guy in the chair. With Parker having to get back on the move, Leeds kept the [[Chitauri Energy Core]] safe in the meantime and urged Parker to be careful. [[File:SMH Washington Monument 15.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds trapped inside the falling elevator]] When Parker ended up being trapped in the [[Damage Control Deep Storage Vault]] and missed the finals the next day, Leeds kept the energy core and participated in the finals, leaving the team winning the competition. Once [[Roger Harrington]] took the team to the [[Washington Monument]], Leeds was called by Parker to get rid of the energy core only to have it snatched up by Toomes to questioned him, only to retrieve it back to Leeds. [[File:SMH Mentor 4.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds is saved by [[Spider-Man]] in the elevator]] At the top of the Monument, Leeds' backpack was starting to burn down as the power core exploded, damaging part of the building and trapping several of the Academic Decathlon team members inside the elevator. While several people were saved by the security, Leeds, Toomes, and Harrington were trapped in the elevator, only to be saved by the arrival of Spider-Man.{{Ref|SMH}} ====Back to New York==== [[File:SMH Ned Hall.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds and [[Peter Parker]] discuss about class]] {{Quote|Dude, you wanna be a high school dropout?"
"I am so far beyond high school right now.|Ned Leeds and [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} In the wake of the events of [[Washington, D.C.]], Leeds returned to [[New York City]] where all of the new positive attention is being put on [[Spider-Man]], following the success of the [[Rescue at the Washington Monument]]. While walking through the school's hallways, Leeds greeted Peter Parker and questioned what it was like being famous without anyone actually knowing, as Parker told Leeds once again to not tell anybody the truth. Leeds told Parker he was going to class only to be told he was not going to class, saying he figured out Vulture was using the technology stolen from Damage Control to make weapons and all he had to do now was catch Vulture in the act. [[File:ParkerLeds-LeavingMoritaOffice.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds asks [[Peter Parker]] if he was expelled]] Having Parker losing his [[Spider-Man Suit]], Leeds waited for him to return to his daily life at [[Midtown School of Science and Technology]] and also put his superhero activities on hold. Sitting at the hallway, Leeds confronted Parker after he was sent to the office of Principal [[Morita]]. Leeds assumed Parker was expelled only to be wrong, relieved on how lucky he was. While Parker improved his schoolwork, Leeds and he finished the Lego Death Star they had worked on for months, much to their considerable satisfaction.{{Ref|SMH}} ====[[Ambush on Peter Parker|Fighting Shocker]]==== [[File:Ned Leeds stops the Shocker.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds stops [[Shocker]] from killing Parker]] {{Quote|What are you doing here? There's a dance."
"I'm... looking at... porn.|[[Warren]] and Ned Leeds|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} At the homecoming dance, Leeds discovered that [[Peter Parker]] had left the dance. After following his friend, Leeds discovered [[Shocker]] nearly killing his friend. Trying to save his friend's life, Leeds intervened and distracted Shocker with one of Parker's [[Web-Shooters]], giving Spider-Man the advantage to web him against a bus. Upon recovering, Parker revealed to Ned that [[Vulture]] is in fact, [[Liz Allan]]'s father, much to Leeds' shock. [[File:SMH Ned Leeds Thinking of An Excuse.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds making up an excuse to [[Warren]]]] As Parker went after Vulture before he could steal [[Avengers]]' equipment, Leeds was able to contact [[Happy Hogan]], and locating Parker's phone, which was on Toomes' car. Leeds used a couple of computers in the school to help Parker in his mission, as well as to help him drive [[Flash Thompson]]'s car, which Parker stole from him, much to Ned's delight. After Spider-Man arrived at Vulture's [[Adrian Toomes' Headquarters|lair]], Leeds was caught by [[Warren]], one of the school's teachers. To cover for Parker, he claimed to be watching pornography.{{Ref|SMH}} ====Back to School Life==== [[File:SMH Promo Still 3.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds and [[Peter Parker]] discuss saving his life]] {{Quote|It looked so insane. That whole– Like, it was just crazy. [[Shocker|He]]– He was just, like... And you were like... And then I just hit him with [[Web-Shooters|the]]... It was so– Oh, my God."
"I mean, you saved me. It was awesome.|Ned Leeds and [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} Following [[Adrian Toomes]]' incarceration, Leeds and [[Peter Parker]] had returned to [[Midtown School of Science and Technology]] and talked about their fight against the [[Shocker]]. Leeds excitedly recounted his brief experience in the field while Parker thanked him for saving his life. They quickly ran into [[Liz Allan]], who was moving to [[Oregon]] due to her father's arrest, and Parker decided to talk to her. [[File:Interviewing Ned (Who Is Spider-Man).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds being interviewed]] Leeds and Parker then attended the decathlon meeting in an announcement of their new leader: [[Michelle Jones]]. When Jones stated that her friend's call her "MJ," Leeds reminded Jones that she told them that she has no friends, to which Jones stated that she didn't have.{{Ref|SMH}} Sometime after, Leeds was interviewed by [[Betty Brant]] and [[Jason Ionello]], anchors of the school's news team, as to his thoughts on [[Spider-Man]]'s true identity. Leeds, defending his best friend's identity, responded that the costumed hero's identity was a mystery and would always be.{{Ref|SMHDS}} ====Field Trip==== [[File:Ned Leeds (Avengers Infinity War).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds causes a distraction]] {{Quote|Ned! Hey! I need you to cause a distraction."
"Holy shit. We're all gonna die! There's a [[Q-Ship|spaceship]]! Everybody hide!|[[Peter Parker]] and Ned Leeds|Avengers: Infinity War}} In [[2018|May 2018]], while on a field trip to {{WPS|MOMA}}, Leeds was listening to music, when [[Peter Parker]] tapped him on the face to ask him to cause a distraction. Leeds looked at Parker and looked out the window and saw a [[Q-Ship]] descending on [[Greenwich Village]]. This caused him to begin screaming that an invasion was occurring, drawing his classmates’ attention, as well as the [[Watcher Informant|bus driver]], allowing Parker to escape the bus and head towards the disturbance.{{Ref|AIW}} Later the following day, Leeds was a victim of the [[Snap]].{{Ref|AE}} ====Heartfelt Reunion==== [[File:NedLeeds-Endgame.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds reunites with [[Peter Parker]]]] {{Quote|Dude!|Ned Leeds to [[Peter Parker]]|Avengers: Endgame}} [[2023|Five years later]], as a result of the [[Blip]], Leeds was restored to life. Leeds was one of several students who would have to retake junior year, now during the current [[2023]]-[[2024]] school year. On the first day of the new school year, Leeds saw [[Peter Parker]] and they exchanged an emotional reunion, realizing they had been both victims.{{Ref|AE}} ===Europe Vacation Trip=== ====Preparing for the Vacation==== [[File:Ned Leeds (Midtown High).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds discusses the trip with [[Peter Parker]]]] {{Quote|I may not know much, but I do know one thing: Europeans love Americans."
"Really?"
"And more than half of them are women!|Ned Leeds and [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: Far From Home}} Over the course of the school year, Leeds noticed that [[Peter Parker]] had developed feelings towards [[Michelle Jones]]. Also, Leeds was told about Parker's time in [[Battle of Titan|space]]. Towards the end of the school year, Leeds and Parker both signed up to go on a sponsored trip to [[Europe]] in the summer. On the last day of school in [[2024|June 2024]], Parker explained to Leeds that he had plotted out a six-step plan to confess his feelings and hopefully win Jones' heart during their trip. Leeds encouraged Parker not to go through with the plan, as he was excited by the idea of them being two American bachelors in Europe. When Jones approached them, Leeds accidentally embarrassed Parker in front of her when he let slip that Parker had a "plan" for the trip, which he covered with a lie that Parker intended to collect miniature spoons.{{Ref|SMFFH}} ====Plane Ride Romance==== [[File:Spider-ManFarFromHomeInternationalTeaser8.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds helps [[Peter Parker]] on the plane]] {{Quote|Well, we actually got to talking on the plane, and it turns out we have a lot in common. So, uh, we're boyfriend-girlfriend now."
"Whatever happened to being an American bachelor in [[Europe]]?"
"Peter, those were the words of a boy. That boy met a [[Betty Brant|woman]]. A very strong and powerful woman. And now, that boy's a man.|Ned Leeds and [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: Far From Home}} When the trip began, Leeds attempted to help Parker with the first step of his plan - sitting next to Jones on the airplane and watching movies together. He tried to persuade [[Betty Brant]] to trade seats with Parker by claiming that Parker was allergic to a perfume that the lady in front of them was wearing. Unfortunately, their chaperone and teacher [[Roger Harrington]] overheard this and re-arranged the students himself. Jones sat with [[Brad Davis]], a survivor of the Snap. Parker sat next to Harrington and a new teacher [[Julius Dell]], while Leeds sat next to Brant. On the flight, Leeds mostly played video games, but when he looked up and made eye contact with Brant, they quickly established a rapport. By the time the plane landed in [[Venice]], [[Italy]], Leeds and Brant had decided to become a couple despite Leeds' initial plan to be a bachelor.{{Ref|SMFFH}} ====[[Battle in the Grand Canal]]==== [[File:Ned Peter MJ Betty.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds witnesses the attack of [[Hydro-Man]]]] {{Quote|What are you gonna do about the [[Hydro-Man|water monster]]?"
"Nothing. It's dead. And besides, that [[Mysterio]] guy's all over it.|Ned Leeds and [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: Far From Home}} Leeds and Brant were inseparable as they explored Venice, but the day took an unexpected turn when a [[Hydro-Man|water monster]] burst through the Grand Canal and attacked the city. As they ran away, Leeds worked to distract his classmates so they would not notice that Parker himself was trying to fight the monster. [[File:Spider-ManFarFromHomeTeaserTrailer86.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds watches the news broadcast with his classmates]] That evening at the [[Hotel DeMatteis]], Leeds and his classmates tried to make sense of what they had just seen. He found an online article that claimed a man named [[Morris Bench]] had recently gained water-related superpowers, but Jones didn't believe it. In addition to the attack, the class was also interested in the [[Mysterio|strange new hero]] who defeated it. Mishearing the Italian news coverage that called the man "l'uomo di mistero" as "l'uomi di ''misterio''," Leeds and Brant coined the moniker "Mysterio." As Leeds and Parker got ready for bed, Leeds asked Parker what he planned to do if another monster attack happened. Parker asserted that "Mysterio" could handle the situation and he just wanted to continue to spend time with Jones. Leeds supported his friend, and began to like Parker's situation to his own romance with Brant, but was cut off by an abrupt shot from a tranquilizer gun.{{Ref|SMFFH}} ====Traveling to Prague==== [[File:Spider-ManFarFromHomeTeaserTrailer51.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds discovers they are going to [[Prague]]]] {{Quote|Getting tranqed in the neck by [[Talos|Nick Fury]]? Probably the coolest thing to ever happen to me anyway.|Ned Leeds to [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: Far From Home}} When Leeds awoke the next morning, Parker explained that Leeds had been tranquilized by [[Talos|Nick Fury]], who wanted to recruit Parker to fight the next [[Elementals|monster]], which was projected to strike soon in [[Prague]]. Soon after, Harrington and Dell announced that their itinerary had been reworked by the travel company to go to the [[Czech Republic]]. Parker quickly put together that the "travel representative" was actually working on Fury's behalf, effectively hijacking the class trip. Leeds found this prospect very exciting. [[File:Betty Brant & Ned Leeds.png|{{AltFloat}}|right|Leeds and [[Betty Brant]] on the bus]] Leeds and Brant texted each other as they were bused through [[Austria]], and with her took note of a [[Tony Stark's Glasses|pair of glasses]] Parker had recently acquired. Leeds and the class were excited when they were told that they would be attending a regional festival while in Prague; a few hours later, this was changed to a four-hour opera. Leeds was the only student who tried to defend the idea, knowing that it was to keep their class safe from the impending attack from an [[Elementals|Elemental]]. Still, he was not sold on the idea and with Brant, he snuck out of the opera house to attend the carnival anyway.{{Ref|SMFFH}} ====[[Attack on the Prague Carnival]]==== [[File:Ned Leeds & Betty Brant (2023).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds and Brant watch [[Mysterio]] and [[Spider-Man]]]] {{Quote|Do you think that's [[Spider-Man]]?"
"No, no, no. It's like a [[Europe]]an rip-off version of him. I was actually reading about him the other day, it's not him.|[[Betty Brant]] and Ned Leeds|Spider-Man: Far From Home}} Brant and Leeds rode a Ferris wheel together when suddenly the [[Molten Man|fire Elemental]] struck. [[Mysterio]] and Parker appeared on the scene to counter it, with Parker wearing a new spider-suit to keep him from being recognized. However, Brant quickly made a connection between the hero's powers and believed it was in fact Spider-Man. Leeds tried to cover for his friend, inventing the alias "Night Monkey" and claiming him to be a "European knock-off" of Spider-Man. When the monster approached the Ferris wheel and it became clear that they were in danger, Leeds reluctantly called for "Night Monkey" to rescue him and Brant. [[File:Ned Walks In.png|{{AltFloat}}|right|Leeds finds [[Peter Parker]] and [[Michelle Jones]]]] Later that night, when Leeds returned to their hotel suite, he found Parker wearing his stealth Spider-suit in front of Jones. He tried to cover for his friend by complimenting the "costume" and that it was for a costume party, but Parker and Jones explained that Jones knew about Parker's secret identity. Leeds was then informed that Mysterio was actually a villain who had been staging the Elemental attacks, and that Parker was on his way to [[Berlin]], [[Germany]]. Leeds was then asked to cover for him by telling their chaperones that Parker would be visiting family in Berlin instead of flying back to the United States with the rest of the class.{{Ref|SMFFH}} ====[[Battle of London]]==== [[File:Far From Home 43.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds watches the [[Elemental Fusion]] descend upon [[London]]]] {{Quote|I wasted my life playing video games and we're gonna die!|Ned Leeds|Spider-Man: Far From Home}} Unknown to Leeds, Mysterio [[Ambush in Berlin|defeated]] Spider-Man in Berlin and used stolen information-gathering technology to redirect the class to fly from Prague to [[London]], [[England]], the location of his fifth and final Elemental attack. The sight of the [[Elemental Fusion]] tipped Jones off that Mysterio knew that she and Leeds were aware of the truth. To protect their classmates, Leeds and Jones broke off from the rest of the group but were followed by Brant and [[Flash Thompson]]. [[File:SMFarFromHomeTrailer63.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds gets help from [[Happy Hogan]]]] The four soon ran into [[Happy Hogan]], who introduced himself as an ally of Spider-Man's and worked to get the group to safety. However, the plan quickly fell apart as Leeds and the others found themselves cornered in the Tower of London Museum. The group tried to fight back, but it soon became clear that they could not overpower Mysterio's [[Stark Industries Combat Drones|drones]]. Believing his death to be imminent, Leeds confessed that he felt he'd wasted his life playing video games. However, the drones came to a sudden stop; elsewhere in the city, Spider-Man had defeated Mysterio.{{Ref|SMFFH}} ====Return Home==== [[File:Brant Leeds Parker.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds speaks with [[Peter Parker]]]] {{Quote|Men and women grow apart. But the journey they shared together will always be a part of them.|Ned Leeds to [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: Far From Home}} Leeds and his classmates soon boarded a flight back to the [[United States]], again sitting next to Brant while Parker sat beside Jones, who was now his girlfriend. During the flight, Brant and Leeds amicably agreed to end their relationship. After landing at [[Newark]] [[Newark Liberty International Airport|airport]], Leeds and Brant announced this to Parker, before returning to [[New York City]].{{Ref|SMFFH}} ===Unwanted Publicity=== ====Spider-Man Exposed==== [[File:Spider-Man calls Ned Leeds.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds calling [[Peter Parker]] about the news]] {{Quote|Dude!"
"Dude!|Ned Leeds and [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} A week later, Leeds saw that [[Peter Parker]] was being framed for the [[Battle of London]] and [[Mysterio]]'s death, along with his identity being revealed by the [[The Daily Bugle|Daily Bugle]]. Worried, he contacted Parker via face-time. However, Parker had to cut the call short as he was on the [[Queensboro Bridge]] and had to tend to [[Michelle Jones]].{{Ref|SMNWH}} ====Interrogated by Damage Control==== [[File:Don't say anything without a lawyer.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds, [[Michelle Jones]], and [[May Parker]] are taken in by [[Damage Control]]]] {{Quote|I literally helped [[Peter Parker|him]] find the [[Vulture]]. And I helped him hack his [[Spider-Man Suit|suit]] once, and kinda helped him get to space.
"So, in Spider-Man's illegal vigilantism, you were his main accomplice."
"...I would like to have my words stricken from the record.|Ned Leeds and [[P. Cleary]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} Days later, Leeds was brought by the [[United States Department of Damage Control]] to the [[New York City Police Department|New York City Police Precinct]] to be questioned. He came in alongside [[Michelle Jones]] and [[May Parker]] and passed Parker, who was in a separate room. [[File:Ned Leeds interrogated by Damage Control.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds gets interrogated by Agent [[P. Cleary]]]] When it was Leeds' turn, he was brought into an interrogation room and was interrogated by Agent [[P. Cleary]], who asked if Leeds was hungry. Leeds told Cleary that he had helped Parker hack his [[Spider-Man Suit]] in order to remove the [[Training Wheels Protocol]], how he had assisted Parker in his mission to stop [[Vulture]], and how he had made a distraction so Parker could help out in the [[Infinity War]]. Cleary then told Leeds that this information wasn't good on his part as it made him Parker's main accomplice. Leeds then asked to have his words retracted and kept silent.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ====Return to School==== [[File:Ned Leeds & Flash Thompson.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds and [[Flash Thompson]] talk to protestors]] {{Quote|Finally, some privacy. It is so crazy down there.|Ned Leeds to [[Peter Parker]] and [[Michelle Jones]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} That September, the [[2024]]-[[2025]] school year began, with Leeds returning to [[Midtown School of Science and Technology]] along with [[Peter Parker]] and [[Michelle Jones]], beginning their senior year. When they arrived, they were met by [[Flash Thompson]], who voiced his support for Parker. They then walked past [[Betty Brant]], as she reported on Parker's return, and through the crowds of protesters, those who were in support of Parker and those who were in support of [[Mysterio]]. Leeds was asked by one Mysterio supporter who he was, but Thompson interrupted him, stating he was Spider-Man's best friend. At the entrance, [[New York City Police Department|NYPD]] officers escorted Parker in first, while Leeds and Jones stayed behind and came in later. [[File:Ned Leeds MIT.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds plans with [[Spider-Man|Peter Parker]] and [[Michelle Jones]]]] That afternoon when the school day was over, Leeds met Parker and Jones on Midtown's rooftop. He sat down and pulled out his laptop, showing them that he had researched [[Massachusetts Institute of Technology]]. He then discussed going there with them and staying as roommates. He then agreed with Parker that it would be a fresh start for all of them.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ====College Rejection==== [[File:Ned Leeds rejected from MIT.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds get rejected by [[Massachusetts Institute of Technology|MIT]]]] {{Quote|Wait... you guys didn't get in?"
"Yeah, because we're actually friends with [[Spider-Man]].|[[Flash Thompson]] and Ned Leeds|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} In November, Leeds met [[Peter Parker]] and [[Michelle Jones]] at the cafe that Jones worked at and sat down to open his college admissions letter from MIT. However, to his disappointment, he was rejected, as well as Jones and Parker, due to the recent controversy surrounding Parker's identity. Jones then ripped her letter up, and Leeds did the same, only to remember he needed to show it to his parents. [[File:Peter Parker and Ned Leeds.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds after ripping up his letter]] They were then met by [[Flash Thompson]], who told them enthusiastically that he was accepted to MIT. When he learned they weren't, he asked why, and Leeds replied that he and Jones were actually Parker's friends. When Jones was called back to work, Leeds patted Parker on the back and left for home.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ===[[Spider-Man Multiversal Crisis|Multiversal Crisis]]=== ====Locating Multiversal Men==== [[File:Ned Leeds (Sanctum Sanctorum).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds at the [[New York Sanctum]]]] {{Quote|Let's go catch some [[Multiverse]] men.|Ned Leeds to [[Peter Parker]] and [[Michelle Jones]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} Soon after, Leeds and [[Michelle Jones]] were found by [[Doctor Strange]] and taken to the [[New York Sanctum]]. Leeds expressed excitement about being inside the Sanctum and asked Strange what he should do regarding tingling in his hands. Strange told him to see his physician. [[Peter Parker]] then met up with them, and Strange told them that they needed to use their technology to find the universe-displaced people who had come to their universe from within the [[Multiverse]] after Parker had fractured the [[Runes of Kof-Kol|spell]]. [[File:Ned Leeds and Peter Parker.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds explores the [[New York Sanctum]]'s undercroft]] Strange sent them to the undercroft, in which only Leeds expressed awe about going too. Leeds then explored it, finding what he thought was a torture machine, but was only a Pilates machine. He then found a crossbow and other various items. Later, as he became hungry, he opened the refrigerator only to find glasses of eyeballs and other supernatural objects, and quickly changed his mind. [[File:Peter Ned MJ Laptop.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds researches with [[Peter Parker]] and [[Michelle Jones]]]] While researching on his laptop, they met [[Doctor Octopus]] and [[Lizard]] who were in holding cells nearby. Leeds asked if the Lizard was a dinosaur and was surprised he could talk. After finding another [[Electro|universe-displaced person]] near a military institute outside of the city, Leeds told Parker and Parker went to investigate. [[File:Michelle and Ned.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds and [[Michelle Jones]] try to help [[Peter Parker]] via phone]] Leeds and Jones remained at the undercroft and face-timed Parker, who attached his phone to his chest. Leeds informed Parker that they hadn't seen anything from their footage yet, but then witnessed [[Electro]], who consumed electricity from nearby towers before attacking Parker. During Parker's attempt to escape, Leeds and Jones lost connection with him. However, soon after, Electro appeared in a holding cell, along with [[Sandman]]. Surprised at seeing the different universe-displaced, Leeds asked if a tree was also one, in which Electro informed him it was just a tree. Leeds and Jones remained there for the night. [[File:Peter Parker, Ned Leeds & Michelle Jones.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds watches [[Peter Parker]] and [[Doctor Strange]]’s interaction]] That next day, Leeds and Jones saw that Parker returned with [[Norman Osborn]]. Hearing that Osborn recognized Jones initials, Leeds was surprised that another version of his friend existed in his universe and that her counterpart goes by a different name, {{WPS|Mary Jane Watson (Sam Raimi film series)|Mary Jane}}, as he wondered if there were other versions of himself within the Multiverse. Osborn spoke with Octopus, who was surprised to see him. Sandman then revealed that both of them had died in their universe. Strange then transported himself there and appeared with the [[Macchina di Kadavus]]. He told them he was there to finish the spell and transported Osborn into a cell. Leeds watched as Parker used his [[Web-Shooters]] to grab the Macchina and run off with it, with Strange in pursuit. [[File:Sling Ring (No Way Home).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds takes Strange's Sling Ring]] Moments later, Parker returned through an [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]] and told them that he had trapped Strange in a [[Mirror Dimension|mirror place]]. He then gave Jones the Macchina and handed Leeds Strange's [[Sling Ring]], asking them to go and wait for him, as he was to help cure the universe-displaced.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ====Finding Spider-Men==== [[File:Ned Leeds & Michelle Jones.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds and [[Michelle Jones]] at the [[Leeds Residence]]]] {{Quote|I opened a wrong [[Inter-Dimensional Portal|portal]] to the [[Amazing Spider-Man|wrong Peter Parker]]."
"Yeah. I guess you just keep doing it until you find the [[Spider-Man|real one]].|Ned Leeds and [[Michelle Jones]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} Leeds and Jones went to [[Leeds Residence|Leeds' house]] and waited. They turned the television on and saw news reports about recent destruction at a condominium, both knowing that Parker had been there and worried for his safety. Jones told Leeds she was going to push the button on the Macchina to activate it, but stopped when Leeds waved his arms in the air, stating he wanted to see Parker. A spark of [[magic]] flickered in the air before them and Jones asked Leeds to repeat what he just did. [[File:Ned & MJ meet the Amazing Spider-Man.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds encounters an [[Amazing Spider-Man|alternate Spider-Man]]]] Leeds did so, and conjured an [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]] using the [[Sling Ring]]. To their excitement, they saw what appeared to be Parker in an alley way. They called out to him and when he jumped through, they saw that he was [[Amazing Spider-Man|another Spider-Man]]. Startled and confused by this, Leeds and Jones asked who he was. Leeds started to bring up the [[Runes of Kof-Kol|spell]], and Jones stopped him from saying too much, before the other Spider-Man deduced that his studies on multidimensional travel was real. [[File:Peter-Two meets Ned and MJ.PNG|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds meets [[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|another alternate Spider-Man]]]] Jones told Leeds to try again and this time, [[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|another Spider-Man]] walked through. Leeds asked if he was another Spider-Man and why he didn't tell them that, in which he replied he kept his identity anonymous. After the two Spider-Man used their [[Synthetic Webbing|webbing]] on each other, they told Leeds and Jones where they went when they needed alone time, thinking that that was what Parker was doing. Leeds and Jones then figured out where Parker was most likely and took the other Spider-Men with them.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ====Engineering Cures==== [[File:Hugging Peter Parker.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds comforts [[Peter Parker]]]] {{Quote|Do you have a best friend too?"
"I did."
"You... did?"
"{{WPS|Harry Osborn (Sam Raimi film series)|He}} died in my arms. After he tried to kill me.|Ned Leeds and [[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} Leeds and Jones arrived at [[Midtown School of Science and Technology]] with the [[Macchina di Kadavus]], and went to the rooftop where they found [[Peter Parker]], crying and in deep distraught. They learned that his [[May Parker|aunt]] had died and comforted him. Jones then signaled the other two Spider-Men to join them. Leeds watched as Parker said bitterly that he didn't care if the villains died fighting them and prepared to send them and the other Spider-Men back to their universes. However, after hearing the other Spider-Men's stories of loss, Parker was encouraged to keep persevering. [[File:Peter Parker, Ned Leeds & Peter Parker.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds speaks with the [[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man]]]] Leeds and Jones then joined Parker and the other Spider-Men to one of Midtown's laboratory rooms. They watched as the three concocted cures for the universe-displaced. As they worked, Leeds asked the older Spider-Man if he had a best friend. He replied that he did, but he had died in his arms after he had attempted to kill him. Fearing that he might follow in that individual's footsteps, Leeds became unsettled and remained quiet. [[File:Ned Leeds & Spider-Man.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds reacts to [[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|Spider-Man]]'s organic webbing]] Later on, Leeds called out to Parker and all three responded, confused at who he was talking to. Leeds became exasperated and told them to look at his laptop. Leeds then told Parker that he wouldn't become a super villain and try to kill him, granting him confused looks from Parker and Jones. After the cures were concocted, Leeds and Jones were tasked to stay at the laboratory while Parker and the other Spider-Man left with the Macchina.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ====[[Battle at Liberty Island]]==== [[File:Inter-Dimensional Portal (NWH).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds and [[Michelle Jones]] retrieve the [[Macchina di Kadavus]]]] {{Quote|Did you just open a [[Inter-Dimensional Portal|portal]]?"
"Yes, yes, sir. I did.|[[Doctor Strange]] and Ned Leeds|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} Leeds and Jones waited for the signal from Parker and Leeds used the [[Sling Ring]] to open up another [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]] in which Parker tossed them the Macchina. However, Leeds was unable to close the portal, telling Jones that he had only opened them and they had closed on their own. As Leeds and Jones tried to offer suggestions of what to do, they were soon confronted by the [[Lizard]], who wanted the Macchina. Leeds and Jones ran through Midtown's laboratory room, dodging as the Lizard slammed into laboratory tables. Parker managed to catch up to them and tried to stop the Lizard, but he was unsuccessful. [[File:Doctor Strange, Leeds and Jones.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds with Doctor Strange and Jones]] As Leeds and Jones left Midtown and escaped through another portal onto the [[Statue of Liberty]], the Lizard followed. Leeds then conjured another portal, in which water came through and knocked the Lizard off his feet. Parker then subdued the Lizard and retrieved the cure, giving it to him. As Leeds opened another portal for him and Jones to head back to Midtown, [[Doctor Strange]] walked through it as he took Sling Ring and the Macchina back from him and Jones. However, Leeds and Jones convinced Strange to hold off on reversing the spell as they explained that Parker's plan to cure the multiverses displaced people was working. Leeds, Jones and Strange watched as the Lizard reverted into his human form of Dr. Curt Connors. Before Strange went to meet Parker, Leeds was asked by the latter if he was the one who opened the portal that brought him to their location as he told him that he did, which surprised him of his ability to perform [[magic]]. [[File:Ned Leeds (Cloak of Levitation).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds is saved by the [[Cloak of Levitation]]]] Leeds and Jones remained on the scaffolding of the Statue and witnessed from a distance the [[Green Goblin]]'s attack, in which he stole the Macchina. When Strange retrieved it back, a [[Pumpkin Bombs|Pumpkin Bomb]] that had been placed inside detonated and released the unstable [[Runes of Kof-Kol|spell]]. This caused a massive rift within the [[Multiverse]], which created a tremor that caused the scaffolding of the Statue to fall down. As a result, Jones lost her balance and fell, but was rescued. Leeds also fell off, but was rescued by the [[Cloak of Levitation]], which carried him safely to the ground. Leeds then ran off to see Jones and the two hugged. Parker saw them and asked if they were okay, before going to fight the Goblin. [[File:Michelle Jones-Watson & Ned Leeds.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds and [[Michelle Jones]] watch as [[Peter Parker]] fights [[Green Goblin]]]] Leeds and Jones then watched in horror as Parker nearly beat Green Goblin to death in his rage, only for the older Spider-Man to stop him. They watched as Parker administered the cure to Green Goblin, transforming back into Osborn, and said goodbye to the other Spider-Men, as well as the arrival of an infinite number of universe-displaced people emerging from within the rift in the Multiverse.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ====A Friendship Lost==== [[File:Ned realizes he will forget Peter.png|{{AltFloat}}|left|Leeds learns he will forget [[Peter Parker]]]] {{Quote|I'll come find you, okay?"
"I know you will.|[[Peter Parker]] and Ned Leeds|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} Leeds and Jones were then met by Parker, who revealed to them that he had asked Strange to cast the [[Runes of Kof-Kol|spell]] again, this time removing everyone in their universe's memory of him in order to fix the cracks in the [[Multiverse]]. [[File:Ned Leeds hugs Peter Parker.png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds hugs [[Peter Parker]] goodbye]] At this news, Leeds burst into tears and hugged Parker, who tried to console Leeds telling him that he will find them and re-establish their friendship. Parker and Leeds then did their handshake for the last time. After Parker said goodbye to Jones, Leeds watched tearfully as he swung away.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ===College Bound=== ====Getting into MIT==== [[File:Ned Leeds (December 2024).png|{{AltFloat}}|Leeds eating a donut at [[Peter Pan Donut & Pastry Shop]]]] {{Quote|[[MIT]], they're the Engineers. The mascot."
"Oh. Look at you with the school spirit!"
"Tell anyone, I will deny it.|[[Michelle Jones]] and Ned Leeds|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} Afterwards, Leeds and [[Michelle Jones]] were admitted to [[Massachusetts Institute of Technology]]. A few weeks later, Leeds visited Jones at [[Peter Pan Donut & Pastry Shop]] and was surprised to find her in the college spirit. Also there was a [[Peter Parker|young man]] who looked at Leeds and considered talking to him, but decided not to.{{Ref|SMNWH}} ====High School Graduation==== In the [[2025|following June]], Leeds was among the students who graduated from [[Midtown School of Science and Technology]] as the class of [[2025]].{{Ref|SMNWHTMFSV}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|Dude, I got [[Doctor Strange]] [[magic]].|Ned Leeds to [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} *'''[[Magic]]''': Leeds possesses dormant magical abilities and was able to use a [[Sling Ring]] to open an [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]] without prior practice. He also claimed that his grandmother said that magic was in his family and that he felt tingling in his hands which might be more evidence of latent magical ability. **'''[[Magic#Eldritch Magic 2|Eldritch Magic]]''': After gaining a Sling Ring, Leeds was able to figure out how to channel Eldritch Magic to create portals for himself and his friends. However, Leeds' abilities seem to be limited to creating portals due to his lack of practice in manipulation of dimensional energy. ***'''Portal Creation''': [[File:The Amazing Spider-Man arrives.png|thumb|250px|Leeds opens a portal]] Using the Sling Ring, Leeds was able to create multiple portals to help his friend, Spider-Man, for the Battle of the Liberty Tower. He continued to create portals until he summoned back a stuck [[Doctor Strange]] from the [[Mirror Dimension]] who was shocked at Leeds' capability to create portals with little time to learn. ****'''Dimensional Travel''': When using a Sling Ring, Leeds could open a portal to anywhere. Although he isn't very skilled, he was able to open a portal to an alley to find an [[Amazing Spider-Man|alternate Spider-Man]]. He then opened one up to find another [[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|alternate Spider-Man]] on a rooftop in [[New York City]]. However, he wanted to find his [[Spider-Man]], not alternate versions. ===Abilities=== *'''Gifted Intellect''': Ned Leeds, like his friend [[Peter Parker]], is an intelligent science enthusiast, and a member of the [[Midtown School of Science and Technology]] academic decathlon team. Parker told [[Massachusetts Institute of Technology|MIT]]'s assistant vice chancellor that he and [[Michelle Jones]] are the two smartest people he has ever met in his entire life. He is also intuitive when it comes to [[magic]]. After his memories of Parker were erased, he was admitted to the prestigious school. {{Quote|You hacked a [[Spider-Man Suit|multi-million dollar suit]].|[[Tony Stark]] to [[Peter Parker]]|Spider-Man: Homecoming}} *'''Expert Hacker''': [[File:SMH Trailer 35.png|thumb|250px|Leeds hacking the [[Spider-Man Suit|suit]]]] Ned Leeds is a hacker skilled enough to bypass the [[Training Wheels Protocol]] installed in the [[Spider-Man Suit]] by [[Tony Stark]] himself. He also helped Parker locate [[Vulture]] and [[Electro]]. *'''Multilingualism''': Ned is fluent in his native English, as well as Tagalog, as he translated his grandmother's words in Tagalog for the alternate Spider-Men. He took Spanish class with Parker and also demonstrated a small degree of proficiency in Italian in his text messages with the latter.{{Ref|SMA}} ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Web-Shooters]]''': Leeds used one of [[Spider-Man]]'s [[Web-Shooters]] to keep [[Shocker]] from using his [[Shocker's Gauntlet|gauntlet]] to kill Spider-Man. *'''Crossbow''': Leeds found a crossbow loaded with a stake in the [[New York Sanctum|Sanctum Sanctorum]]'s undercroft. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Spider-Man Suit|Spider-Man Mask]]''': While attempting to locate [[Vulture]], Leeds tried on [[Peter Parker]]'s mask for fun. *'''[[Sling Ring]]''': Given a Sling Ring by [[Spider-Man|Peter Parker]], Leeds attempted to use it to find him after [[May Parker]]'s death. However, he accidentally had found two other [[Amazing Spider-Man|Spider]][[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|-Men]] from alternate universes. Leeds continued to use the device during the clash on top of the [[Statue of Liberty]]. *'''[[Cloak of Levitation]]''': Whilst present during the clash on the [[Statue of Liberty]], Leeds fell off the statue but was rescued by the Cloak of Levitation. The cloak allowed him to levitate away from the collapsing scaffolding, then safely deposited him on the ground and flew away. *'''Asus ROG Gaming Laptop''': Leeds owned a private gaming laptop which he utilized to help search for the [[Spider-Man Multiversal Crisis|universe-displaced]] visitors after the botched [[Runes of Kof-Kol]] spell. ==Facilities== {{Expand}} *'''[[Midtown School of Science and Technology]]''': Leeds attends Midtown High with [[Spider-Man|Peter Parker]] and [[Michelle Jones]] since the beginning of the high school year, and enrolls back in after he was [[Blip|blipped]] from existence to retake the entire course again. *'''[[Parker Residence]]''': Leeds often hangs out with Parker in school and at his residence, and also discovered that Peter Parker is Spider-Man. *'''[[Toomes Residence]]''': Leeds and Parker attended [[Liz Allan]]'s party at her house. *'''Hotel''': Leeds and his classmates stayed in a hotel in [[Washington, D.C.]] for the national academic decathlon competition. He shared a room with Parker, where they hacked the [[Spider-Man Suit]]. *'''[[Hotel DeMatteis]]''': Leeds and his classmates stayed in a hotel in [[Venice]] during their European trip. He shared a room again with Parker, and was incapacitated by [[Talos]] (disguised as [[Nick Fury]]) with a tranquilizer gun. *'''Hotel''': Leeds and his classmates stayed in another hotel during their European trip, this time in [[Prague]]. {{Quote|I can't believe I'm in the [[Sanctum Sanctorum]].|Ned Leeds to [[Doctor Strange]]|Spider-Man: No Way Home}} *'''[[New York Sanctum]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Ned Leeds' Lola|Grandmother]] *Father *Mother ===Allies=== *[[Midtown School of Science and Technology]] - Former High School **[[Morita]] - Former Principal **[[Roger Harrington]] - Former Teacher and Decathlon Supervisor **[[Warren]] - Former Teacher **[[Barry Hapgood]] - Former Teacher **[[Andre Wilson]] - Former Teacher **[[Julius Dell]] - Former Teacher **[[Brad Davis]] - Former Classmate **[[Josh Searing]] - Former Classmate **[[Zach Cooper]] - Former Classmate **[[Yasmin Monette]] - Former Classmate **[[Tyler Corbyn]] - Former Classmate **[[Zoha Souliotis]] - Former Classmate **[[Sebastian Fedas]] - Former Classmate *[[Massachusetts Institute of Technology]] **[[Michelle Jones]] - Classmate, Former Decathlon Leader, and Close Friend **[[Flash Thompson]] - Classmate *[[Betty Brant]] - Former Classmate, Friend, and Ex-Girlfriend *[[Jason Ionello]] - Former Classmate *[[Spider-Man|Peter Parker/Spider-Man]] - Former Classmate, Former Partner, and Former Best Friend *[[Liz Allan]] - Former Classmate and Former Decathlon Leader *[[Abe Brown]] - Former Classmate *[[Tiny McKeever]] - Former Classmate *[[Cindy Moon]] - Former Classmate *[[Charles Murphy]] - Former Classmate *[[Sally Avril]] - Former Classmate *[[Seymour O'Reilly]] - Former Classmate *[[May Parker]] † *[[Happy Hogan]] *[[Hulk|Bruce Banner/Hulk]] - Resurrector *[[Talos]] † (disguised as [[Nick Fury]]) *[[Doctor Strange|Stephen Strange/Doctor Strange]] - Savior *[[Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man|Peter Parker/Spider-Man]] *[[Amazing Spider-Man|Peter Parker/Spider-Man]] *[[Doctor Octopus|Otto Octavius/Doctor Octopus]] - Temporary Enemy *[[Sandman|Flint Marko/Sandman]] *[[Electro|Max Dillon/Electro]] - Temporary Enemy *[[Lizard|Curt Connors/Lizard]] - Former Enemy *[[Green Goblin|Norman Osborn/Green Goblin]] - Former Enemy {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Adrian Toomes' Crew]] **[[Vulture|Adrian Toomes/Vulture]] **[[Shocker|Herman Schultz/Shocker]] **[[Randy Vale]] *[[Thanos]] † - Killer *[[Elementals]] **[[Hydro-Man]] **[[Molten Man]] **[[Elemental Fusion]] *[[Quentin Beck's Crew]] **[[Mysterio|Quentin Beck/Mysterio]] † - Attempted Killer **[[William Ginter Riva]] **[[Guterman]] *[[United States Department of Damage Control]] **[[P. Cleary]] **[[Foster (Damage Control)|Foster]] {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|SMH}} **{{Appearance|SMFFHP1}} **{{Appearance|SMFFHP2}} *{{Appearance|AIW}} *{{Appearance|AE}} *{{Appearance|PTDL}} *{{Appearance|SMFFH}} *{{Appearance|SMNWH}} **{{Appearance|TDBPCTT8}} (concurrent events) *{{Appearance|SMBND}} (unreleased) ==Trivia== *In the comics, Ned Leeds is a reporter for ''[[The Daily Bugle]]'' who married [[Betty Brant]] and was brainwashed into believing and acting as the criminal known as the '''Hobgoblin'''. **The [[Marvel Cinematic Universe|MCU]] version of Ned Leeds shares similarities with [[w:c:marvel:Ganke Lee (Earth-1610)|Ganke Lee]], the best friend of [[Miles Morales]] from the [[w:c:marvel:Earth-1610|Ultimate Universe]]. Their most notable similarities are their physical appearances and their shared obsession with superheroes and LEGO. This was referenced in the comics when Ganke adopted the alias of "Ned" to hide his true identity from [[w:c:marvel:Danika Hart (Earth-616)|Danika Hart]]. **Ned's resemblance to Ganke is alluded to in the {{WPS|Sony Pictures Animation}} film ''{{WPS|Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse}}'', where Ganke objects to helping Miles too much out of fear of becoming Spider-Man's "guy in the chair," a title which Ned in the MCU proudly embraces. *Leeds' jacket in ''[[Spider-Man: No Way Home]]'' has the same color scheme as the Hobgoblin's traditional outfit. *Leeds' birthday being November 10th is a reference to ''[[w:c:marvel:Amazing Spider-Man Vol 1 18|Amazing Spider-Man Vol. 1 #18]]'', where Edward Leeds made his first appearance and was released on November 10, 1964. *Leeds enjoys popcorn, {{WPS|Junior Mints}} and gummy worms.{{Ref|SMA}} ==Behind the Scenes== *In an alternate version of the ''[[Spider-Man: Far From Home]]'' [[List of Post-credits Scenes#Spider-Man: Far From Home|mid-credits scene]], Leeds was present when ''[[The Daily Bugle]]'' exposed [[Peter Parker]]'s identity to the world. Batalon recorded some footage and audio for the scene, however it was never used.[https://screenrant.com/spiderman-far-home-credit-scene-originally-included-ned/ Spider-Man: Far From Home’s Credits Scene Originally Included Ned] *According to [[Sarah Halley Finn]], [[Lewis Pullman]] initially auditioned for the role of Ned Leeds for ''[[Spider-Man: Homecoming]]''.[https://www.instagram.com/reel/DJaQnJyNAnL/ IGN on Instagram - May 8, 2025] *[[Geo Corvera]] was a stunt double for [[Jacob Batalon]] in the role of Ned Leeds. *[[James Quach]] was a stand-in for [[Jacob Batalon]] in the role of Ned Leeds. ==References== {{Gallery|Ned Leeds/Gallery}} {{Wq|Ned Leeds}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel|Ganke Lee}} *{{WP}} [[es:Edward Leeds]] [[ru:Нед Лидс]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: Homecoming Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Infinity War Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Endgame Characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: Far From Home Characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: No Way Home Characters]] [[Category:Spider-Man: Brand New Day Characters]] [[Category:Peter's To-Do List Characters]] [[Category:Promotional Campaigns Characters]] [[Category:Comic Characters]] [[Category:Book Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Students]] [[Category:Sorcerers]] [[Category:Midtown School of Science and Technology Students]] [[Category:Massachusetts Institute of Technology Students]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]] [[Category:Resurrected Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Thanos]]
